title: Valorant Chamber's Abilities
description: This datapack adds Valorant Chamber Weapons into Minecraft with a simple way.
body:
# ADD Chamber's weapons abilities in Minecraft.
- Required OPTIFINE to use
- Based on iconic weapons: HeadHunter and the TourDeForce

- Showcase:https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bmjp6vIC5mU
------------------------------------------------------------------
- Obtain by using command:

+ HeadHunter: /function enh_weap:craft/auto_super_crossbow
+ Tour: /function enh_weap:craft/super_crossbow
------------------------------------------------------------------
Features:

Tour de France:
Sounds: VERY LOUD
- Sounds Range:75 block+ far away can be hear
- Range:1000 blocks far
- Firerate:50 arrow/min
- Damage:345+
- Effect: Apply a slow field when bullet hit, apply slowness IV for 4 sec + 1 sec glowing to any entity inside the slow field.
- (The Tour model quite tricky when using, so find out your self!)
- The Tour will not work in offhand.
------------------------------------------------------------------
HeadHunter:
- Sounds: medium
- Sounds range: 25 block far away from the shooter
- Range:200 block
- Firerate:Your CPS (spamming)
- Damage:34.5
- Effect: glowing target when it hit
__________________________________________________________
- BOTH guns have their own sounds when firing
-Multiplayer and singleplayer friendly, NO TPS drop
_________________________________________________________

Have Fun!
